---
title: "nfl_passing"
format: html
editor: visual
---

nfl passing

Question 1.

What is the successful position, route, and location to throw to for a 4th down conversion?

Question 2.

Top ranked passer/reciever duo

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

nfl_passes <- read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/36-SURE/2026/main/data/nfl_passes.csv")

library(readr)

positions <- read_csv("/Users/kendalllucas/Documents/CMSACamp/NFL-Passing/players.csv")
positions <- positions |>
  select(Position, displayName)

#result <- left_join(df1, df2, by = join_by(id_left == id_right))

result <- left_join(nfl_passes, positions, by = join_by("target_player_name" == "displayName"), relationship = "many-to-many")

result |>
  filter(down == 4 & (Position == "RB" | Position == "TE" | Position == "WR")) |>
  group_by(Position, route_ran) |>
  summarise(completion_percentage = mean(complete_pass)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = route_ran, y = completion_percentage)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~Position) +
  coord_flip()
```

#hello

```{r}
install.packages("teamcolors")
library(teamcolors)


teamcolors <- c(
  "LA" = "#00338D",
  "MIN" = "#4F2683",
  "MIA" = "#008e97",
  "BUF" = "#00338D",
  "KC" = "#E31837",
  "PHI" = "#004C54",
  "TB" = "#D50A0A",
  "JAX" = "#006778",
  "CIN" = "#FB4F14",
  "CLE" = "#311D00")

result |>
  mutate(duo = paste(passer_player_name, target_player_name, sep = " & ")) |>
  group_by(duo, posteam) |>
  summarise(yards = sum(yards_gained), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(desc(yards)) |>
  head(n = 15) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(duo, yards), y = yards, fill = posteam)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_light() + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1000, 100)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = teamcolors)


#Rams, Vikings, Dolphins, Bills, Cheifs, Ealges, Bucs, Jags, Bengals, Browns
```

Reasons Kansas is Good and Chi is Bad

-   hellos
